package_title: I will set up a WhatsApp broadcast & re-engagement agent
description:
🔧 I will set up a WhatsApp broadcast & re-engagement agent

I deliver a compliant broadcast system that re-engages opted-in customers with AI-personalized offers using Baileys + n8n + Listmonk (email fallback) — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in, no per-message fees)
• Charge $300-$900 setup + $99-$399/mo; 45-60% CTR vs email 3-5x
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($100, 3 days, 1 rev): Single flow, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($400, 5 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 flows, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($800, 7 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited flows, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your products/goals (form on order)
2. I build & test the WhatsApp agent
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.

n8n_workflow.name: deliver-wa-broadcast-agent
n8n_workflow.note: Tools: Baileys + n8n + Listmonk (email fallback) — all free/self-hosted. Replace code node with your agent logic. Baileys repo: https://github.com/WhiskeySockets/Baileys
